lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle that is in absolute mint condition! It looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom, with every detail meticulously cared for. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a truly pristine, like-new driving experience.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The engine runs reliably and the transmission shifts smoothly through all gears, with no major mechanical issues to report. The interior is clean and comfortable, showing only minor signs of wear consistent with regular use, and all electronic features and climate controls are fully functional. On the exterior, the paint retains a nice shine, though you may find a few small stone chips or light scratches upon close inspection. Overall, this is a dependable car that is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible wear and scratches, and the interior shows significant signs of use. It is currently operational but may require mechanical maintenance in the near future.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows clear signs of wear and tear from regular use. The engine and transmission are in functional condition but may require service soon.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. While it remains a functional and dependable driver, the exterior has several noticeable scratches, a few small dings on the passenger side doors, and some clear coat peeling on the hood. Inside, the upholstery shows significant wear, particularly on the driver's seat bolster, and the carpet has some persistent staining. Mechanically, the engine runs steadily, though the transmission shifts a bit roughly and the brakes will likely need service in the near future. It is an honest car that would be a great fit for a buyer willing to invest a little TLC to address its cosmetic and mechanical needs.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience, combining mechanical integrity with aesthetic appeal. It serves as an exemplary choice for those seeking a premium pre-owned asset that balances proven performance with exceptional value. Rigorously inspected to ensure long-term reliability, this motorcar stands as a testament to quality engineering and diligent ownership.

Hi everyone! I’m so excited to find a new home for this absolute gem of a car! It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is in wonderful shape. It runs smoothly and has clearly been well-cared for over the years—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip! I’m sure the next owner is going to love it just as much as I have. Come take it for a spin!
This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering crisp throttle response via six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VAN
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking both reliability and style. The exterior presents beautifully, maintaining a deep gloss with only the minor, superficial road wear one would expect from a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a fully operational suite of tech and comfort features. Mechanically, it is in solid standing; it has been consistently serviced, offering a smooth, responsive engine and seamless gear transitions. From the tight suspension to the ice-cold air conditioning, every detail has been attended to, ensuring a confident and comfortable driving experience. This is a dependable, attractive, and thoroughly maintained vehicle ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated blend of performance and reliability. Featuring a comprehensive service history and a well-preserved interior, it remains a distinguished choice for the discerning driver. Our thorough inspection confirms its mechanical integrity, ensuring this asset provides a premium ownership experience and enduring value.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances robust performance with refined aesthetics. This unit exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved interior, ensuring a superior driving experience for the discerning owner. It represents an optimal acquisition for those seeking a sophisticated blend of quality and enduring value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive! It's in really solid shape and has been well-maintained over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a dependable daily driver that still looks great on the road. Come take her for a spin—you’re going to love how smoothly she handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving valvetrain. The VANOS system has been recently serviced for optimal variable valve timing, and power is transmitted via a tactile ZF 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. The chassis is mechanically sorted with documented rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, maintaining the precision of its sophisticated multi-link rear suspension. While showing honest patina from driver-focused use, its mechanical fundamentals remain robust, providing a visceral and pure analog performance experience.
Used vehicle in good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Reliable daily driver. Minor cosmetic wear.

This 2019 Audi Q7 has been a meticulously maintained family vehicle, offering a perfect blend of luxury and performance. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that retains a brilliant shine, showing only minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of premium materials; the leather upholstery is supple and clean, with minimal creasing on the driver’s seat bolsters. All technological features, including the intuitive virtual cockpit, navigation, and multi-zone climate control, are fully operational. Mechanically, this SUV is in excellent health with a comprehensive service history. The engine pulls smoothly, the suspension remains tight and responsive, and the transmission shifts without hesitation. It recently underwent a full multi-point inspection and oil service, and the tires have substantial tread depth remaining. This is a reliable, well-presented vehicle that is ready for the road today.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience consistent with its prestigious lineage. Prospective owners will appreciate the mechanical integrity and well-preserved interior, ensuring continued reliability and comfort for the discerning driver.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a high standard of care and consistent mechanical integrity. Offering a seamless blend of performance and reliability, this model remains in commendable condition, ready to provide its next owner with a refined and dependable driving experience. An excellent acquisition for the discerning buyer who prioritizes both long-term value and proven quality.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks and drives great! I’m sad to see it go, but it’s ready for its next adventure with you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2) features the refined 3.6L flat-six M96 powerplant, delivering 320 hp with a linear torque curve that rewards high-revving engagement. Power is delivered via a precise 6-speed manual transaxle to the rear wheels. The chassis remains taut, utilizing its signature multi-link rear suspension and MacPherson front struts for exceptional lateral grip and communicative feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. Recent preventative maintenance includes an upgraded IMS bearing and
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained sedan strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though close inspection reveals minor, typical road wear such as a few small stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features premium leather seating that remains supple and clean, with only light creasing on the driver’s bolster consistent with careful use. All high-tech amenities, including the panoramic sunroof, navigation system, and heated seats, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has a documented service history, a smooth-shifting automatic transmission, and a set of high-quality tires with significant tread remaining. It drives straight, handles predictably, and offers a quiet, refined ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a standard of excellence in the pre-owned market. Offering a harmonious balance of performance and reliability, it features a clean aesthetic and consistent mechanical integrity. A premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a refined and dependable driving experience.

Presenting a distinguished addition to our curated inventory, this vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning motorist. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile that balances performance with proven reliability.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next road trip? This car has been so good to me and is still in wonderful shape! It runs smoothly, looks great, and has been really well-loved. It’s perfect for anyone wanting a dependable vehicle without the new-car price tag. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it drives!

Good condition. Runs well. Regularly maintained. Clean interior. Minimal wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only the minor, expected signs of road use typical of a well-cared-for car. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and features premium leather upholstery that remains soft and supportive, complemented by a fully functional suite of modern technology and dual-zone climate controls. Mechanically, it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, ensuring a smooth, responsive driving experience with excellent tread remaining on the tires and firm braking. It is a reliable, turn-key example ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a distinguished profile and robust mechanical foundation, this vehicle exemplifies a standard of care that ensures long-term reliability. It remains in commendable condition, featuring a well-preserved interior and a powertrain that delivers consistent, authoritative performance. An exceptional acquisition for the professional seeking a balance of sophisticated luxury and proven durability.
